context.projectOverview: Phase 6 — The Medical Team. FINAL buildable sprint (S7): real MedlinePlus/NIH (no-auth) grounded retrieval behind the literature-retrieval egress axis, confined to the SINGLE ESLint-excepted network file, plus cited synthesis (single local-Ollama LLM call) that ABSTAINS unless a retrieved passage supports the claim. Source failure => abstain, NEVER fail-open. cloud-inference stays independently off. CI uses recorded fixtures (no live network).

completedSprints.title: EgressGuard + full SOP wiring
completedSprints.summary: 4f3ba55 — EgressGuard.assertAllowed; ESLint exception at src/medical/retrieval/medline-source.ts (stub, no net import yet); LiteratureRetriever returns {disabled} when off; RetrievalOutcome union; SOP wired in engine.run retrieval branch

criticalConstraints: The REAL network call (fetch/undici) goes ONLY in src/medical/retrieval/medline-source.ts — the ONE ESLint-excepted file (eslint.config.js exception block). A network import in ANY other src/medical file FAILS lint. Confirm the exact excepted path before adding the import.

assertAllowed('literature-retrieval') MUST be called at the network call site (runtime defense-in-depth) BEFORE any fetch attempt. With the axis OFF, retrieve returns {disabled} synchronously and NO network module is touched (already true from S6; keep it).
Inject the HTTP transport (a FetchLike function) so CI uses COMMITTED recorded fixtures — NO live network in tests. The briefing names the exact seam. Tests must pass offline.

LiteratureRetriever.retrieve returns disabled | abstain{reason} | grounded{passages}. On the ON path, call MedlineSource and map to grounded (passages found) or abstain{reason} (none / source error). Source unreachable or error => abstain{reason}, NEVER fail-open.

synthesize: a SINGLE LLM call via the provider-agnostic LLMClient (src/providers/types.ts; local Ollama default via src/providers/factory.ts). It ABSTAINS (abstained=true) unless a retrieved passage supports the claim; every non-abstained clinical claim carries >=1 citation. The LLMClient must be INJECTABLE via deps.llmClient (the S3 seam) so tests spy/fake it. No uncited claim is ever emitted.
cloud-inference axis stays independently OFF: enabling literature-retrieval must NOT enable cloud inference (test it).

Wire synthesize into MedicalSopEngine.run's retrieval branch (literature-retrieval ON + grounded passages => synthesize with citations; otherwise abstain). Keep the gate ordering (consent -> red-flag) FIRST; no LLM/network before the gates.

ESM/NodeNext .js extensions; strict TS; no SDK types outside src/providers/. Add citation/passage types additively to src/medical/types.ts (MedicalAnswer.citations[]). Tests use recorded fixtures + injected LLM spy + injected transport (no live network, no fs mocks). Keep MedicalSopEngine zero-arg constructor (selector.ts:126).
Self-verify: typecheck + build + `npx vitest run` + lint ALL pass (lint 0 errors); FULL suite green; programming team + ts/skill/workflow byte-identical.
